overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The player moves through open plazas, under a distinctive red building structure, past graffiti-covered industrial buildings, and along the water's edge in a bright sunny cyberpunk city with flying cars overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: approaching the large red building structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade admiring the futuristic skyline and flying cars overhead

entered.detail: futuristic hovering vehicle passing overhead against the bright sky
tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
cluster of tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with glass facades across the water
calm harbor water reflecting the sunlight
large industrial building with distinctive red overhanging roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The camera moves forward along the paved walkway toward a large red industrial building, with a futuristic city skyline visible across the water and flying cars passing overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under red industrial structure

events.description: entering shadow under the red building structure, lighting becomes darker
descending concrete stairs to the lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking under the red building structure and descending stairs to the lower waterfront plaza

entered.detail: purple-lit vending machine against the concrete wall
wide concrete staircase leading down to lower level
small industrial structure with graffiti on the walls

segments.scene_description: Moving under the red building's overhang, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The camera descends a concrete staircase to a lower plaza level, passing vending machines and industrial structures while the palm trees and water view temporarily disappear from sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with industrial kiosks and graffiti walls

events.description: exiting covered area into open lower plaza with small buildings
ascending ramp back to main waterfront promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower plaza past graffiti-covered buildings and ascending back to the main waterfront level

notable_agents.action: person walking across the lower plaza toward the water

entered.detail: industrial building with colorful graffiti murals on metal walls
small rectangular structure with closed shutters
yellow and green public seating along the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit lower plaza with graffiti-covered industrial buildings and small kiosks. The camera moves through this area, passing a pedestrian, then ascends back to the main waterfront promenade where palm trees and the city skyline come back into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront edge with direct water access

events.description: approaching the water's edge with direct view of the harbor
camera descends close to the water surface, nearly touching the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge and descending to view the water surface up close

entered.detail: calm greenish water of the harbor filling the lower frame
short black and yellow posts along the water edge
low concrete platform extending into the water
large suspension bridge towers visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: Moving along the waterfront, the camera approaches the water's edge with an unobstructed view of the harbor. The scene features bollards and a concrete dock, with the camera eventually descending very close to the water surface, showing the greenish water and distant bridge structure.

events.description: ascending from water level back to main promenade walkway
passing commercial billboards and returning to the red building area

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial promenade past advertisements and returning toward the red building

entered.detail: large wall with multiple advertisement posters featuring a man's face
colorful street vendor cart with umbrella

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends from the water's edge back to the main promenade, passing a wall with large commercial billboards. The scene returns to the area near the red building, with palm trees lining the right side and a vending cart visible as the walk continues along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunny waterfront promenade that dips into industrial underpasses before returning to the open harbor. It begins on a bright paved walkway lined with palm trees and flying cars, moving forward until the camera passes under the dark, enclosed overhang of a large red industrial building. As the camera descends a concrete staircase into a shaded lower plaza, the view of the skyline is temporarily replaced by vending machines and graffiti-covered walls before the path ascends back into the sunlight. The scene then opens up toward the water's edge, where the camera glides down to the surface of the greenish harbor water and a distant bridge. Finally, the camera rises back to the main promenade, passing large commercial billboards and returning to the palm-lined path near a vending cart.
